name: KYC Solution
scraped_data: Why KYC Solution™ Pricing Stands Out | Pay-per-check model – only pay for the verifications you actually run. | No setup fees – get started without platform or onboarding charges. | No minimum commitment on standard tiers – ideal for growth & testing. | Volume-based discounts – the more you verify, the lower your cost. | Enterprise pricing from as low as €0.10 per verification* | Includes KYC, AML, sanctions & PEP screening, biometrics and more.

Why KYC Solution™ Pricing Stands Out | Pay-per-check model – only pay for the verifications you actually run. | No setup fees – get started without platform or onboarding charges. | No minimum commitment on standard tiers – ideal for growing and testing new markets. | Volume-based discounts – the more you verify, the less you pay per document check. | Enterprise pricing from as low as €0.10 per document verification* for large-scale programmes. | Transparent structure designed for KYC, AML, sanctions & PEP screening, biometric checks and fully digital onboarding.

Plan | Price | Monthly Volume | Key Features | Best For | Starter | From €0.25 / verification | Up to ~5,000 checks/month | • Passport & ID verification | • Biometric face match + basic liveness | • Essential AML & sanctions screening | • Dashboard access + basic API | • No setup fee, no contract | Early-stage fintechs, PSPs, digital platforms, pilot projects, new-market testing | Growth | From €0.18 / verification | 5,000 – 50,000 checks/month | • 230+ country document coverage | • Advanced biometrics & enhanced liveness | • AML, sanctions, PEP, media checks | • Full API + SDK | • Custom rules & workflows | Scaling fintech, crypto, iGaming, telecom & cross-border platforms | Scale | From €0.14 / verification

Provider	Indicative Document Verification Pricing*	Minimum Monthly Commitment / Platform Fees*	Commercial Model Highlights* | KYC Solution™	From approx. €0.25 per check on standard tiers, down to around €0.10 per check at large enterprise scale.	No setup fee. No mandatory minimum commitment on standard tiers. Enterprise pricing is volume-based and fully negotiable.	Simple, transparent pay-per-check model with volume discounts and tailored bundles for KYC, AML, sanctions, PEP and biometric verification – designed to maximise value and minimise total cost of ownership. | Top Competitor 1 (Global KYC/AML Vendor)	Public information indicates higher per-check pricing at low and mid volumes, with typical document verification fees often starting above our entry-level rates.	Frequently offers subscription-style plans with fixed monthly fees, bundled checks and thresholds that may not suit smaller or fluctuating volumes.	Strong feature set, but commercial model can be less flexible for emerging and mid-size businesses that prefer a pure usage-based approach without bundles. | Top Competitor 2 (Enterprise ID Verification Provider)	Self-service and enterprise plans commonly show per-verification pricing that is significantly higher than KYC Solution™ at equivalent volumes, particularly when advanced data extraction and fraud controls are included.	Often sold with monthly minimum commitments and plan-based tiers that require a guaranteed spend, even at lower usage.	Well-known brand in the identity space, but generally aligns with higher budgets and longer-term commitments compared to our flexible, low-barrier model. | Top Competitor 3 (Legacy Verification Platform)	Industry sources and comparison sites indicate document verification often priced at a premium, with more competitive rates only available at very high volumes.	Typically sold via enterprise contracts with volume commitments, platform fees and additional charges for enhanced services.	Comprehensive enterprise solution, but with a pricing structure that can be less accessible to cost-sensitive organisations or those scaling rapidly across multiple markets.
